backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the Ana backend with user profiles, emotional check-ins, journal entries, and supportive response generation, protected by role-based access control. Also supports anonymous guest check-ins with a 10-entry in-memory cache.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single high-confidence feature fix for the ConversationHistory component, ensuring visible message rendering with sufficient contrast in both light and dark themes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, page, hook, and style file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Ana - Your Friend in Every Emotional Need' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state, guest mode, and full-screen page navigation (journal, music, meditation) via boolean state flags, conditionally rendering the appropriate page or the main ChatPage layout.
frontend/src/components/ChatBottomTabs.t: Bottom tab bar component with five tabs (Music, Journal, Meditation, Good Vibes, Watch This); navigation tabs delegate to parent callbacks while content tabs toggle inline panel display with ScrollArea.
frontend/src/components/ConversationHist: Displays a scrollable chat history of check-ins and AI responses, supporting both authenticated and guest users with auto-scroll behavior and loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/ConversationInpu: Renders a chat input form with mood selector buttons, speech-to-text support, and text submission for adding new check-ins for both guest and authenticated users.
Displays a list of mood-specific dance/movement resource links fetched via a utility function, rendered as styled external link items.
frontend/src/components/GoodVibesTabCont: Shows a static list of daily affirmations and feel-good external resource links in a styled card layout.
frontend/src/components/GuestPromptBanne: A dismissible banner prompting guest users to create an account to permanently save their conversations, with session-storage-based dismiss persistence.
frontend/src/components/JournalingMethod: A selectable card button component for displaying a journaling method with an icon, title, and description, with visual selected/unselected states.
frontend/src/components/JournalingTabCon: Renders mood-specific journaling prompts as external links using a utility function, with a brief descriptive header.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout wrapper providing a sticky header with the Ana logo, login/logout button, share functionality, guest badge, and a footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login, logout, and guest-to-login transitions, with loading state feedback.
frontend/src/components/MeditationTabCon: Displays mood-specific guided meditation and mindfulness resource links fetched via a utility function, rendered as styled external link items.
frontend/src/components/MusicControl.tsx: A fixed bottom-right UI control that shows a play button when music is stopped, or a mute/unmute button when music is playing, with tooltips for each action.
Renders a list of mood-based music recommendation links fetched via `getMusicLinks`, each opening in a new tab.
frontend/src/components/PastJournalEntri: Displays a collapsible list of past journal entries with method type badges, mood tags, and formatted timestamps; shows an empty state if no entries exist.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A non-dismissible dialog modal that prompts new users to enter their name and saves it via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` hook.
Displays a structured supportive AI response (main message, relatable story, action options, follow-up question) and automatically reads the main message aloud using speech synthesis.
frontend/src/components/SelfCareTabConte: Renders a list of mood-tailored self-care resource links fetched via `getSelfCareLinks`, each opening in a new tab.
frontend/src/components/StoriesTabConten: Renders a list of mood-relevant story links fetched via `getStoryLinks`, each opening in a new tab.
frontend/src/components/VoiceRecordingIn: Shows an animated microphone indicator with pulsing waveform bars when voice recording is active; renders nothing when not recording.
frontend/src/components/WhatToWatchTabCo: Renders a list of mood-based video/watch links fetched via `getWatchLinks`, each opening in a new tab.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundMusic.ts: A hook that manages a looping background audio element with autoplay, and exposes toggle functions for play/pause and mute/unmute along with playback state.
frontend/src/hooks/useCheckIns.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and adding emotional check-ins, with fallback local response generation based on feelings; supports both authenticated users (via actor) and guests (via useGuestCheckIns).
frontend/src/hooks/useGuestCheckIns.ts: Manages guest emotional check-ins using localStorage, generating local supportive responses by feelings type and syncing state across components via a custom window event.
frontend/src/hooks/useGuestJournalEntrie: Manages guest journal entries stored in localStorage, providing state, loading status, and an addEntry function that persists new entries with a generated ID and timestamp.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useJournalEntries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving journal entries via the backend actor, invalidating the cache on successful save.
Wraps the Web Speech Recognition API in a React hook, managing listening state, final and interim transcripts, errors, and browser support detection.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechSynthesis.ts: Wraps the Web Speech Synthesis API in a React hook, handling voice loading, speaking state, and providing a speak() callback with English voice preference and detailed logging.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving the authenticated caller's user profile via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on update.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme color tokens (warm peach/coral palette), plus custom classes for chat bubble styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Main chat page layout combining conversation history, input, bottom navigation tabs, guest banner, and background music control within a frosted-glass styled container.
frontend/src/pages/JournalPage.tsx: Journaling page offering five writing methods (gratitude, reflective, stream, mood, intentions) with method-specific form components, draft persistence, and save functionality for both guest and authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/MeditationPage.tsx: Meditation page that lets users select a mood category and browse tailored meditation techniques, with a detail/player view for the selected technique.
frontend/src/pages/MusicPage.tsx: Music page that displays mood-categorized music tracks and opens an embedded player when a track is selected, closing it when the mood changes.
frontend/src/pages/WelcomeScreen.tsx: Welcome/onboarding screen presenting two options—continue as guest or log in with Internet Identity—with feature highlights for each path.
frontend/src/utils/meditationData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and static data for meditation mood categories (e.g., calm, anxious, stressed) and their associated guided meditation techniques, each with a name, description, duration, category, and YouTube embed URL.
frontend/src/utils/moodResourceLinks.ts: Exports mood-keyed collections of music tracks (with YouTube embed URLs) and other resource links, organized by emotional states like happy, sad, calm, and energetic.
frontend/src/utils/shareHelpers.ts: Provides utility functions for sharing content via the Web Share API with a clipboard fallback, plus a helper to generate share text for the app.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and helpers to clear sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode support, CSS variable-based color tokens using oklch, custom warm shadow utilities, Inter font family, and the animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata and state for the Ana chat app, noting a known issue where chat messages are not visible and referencing a fix request for the ConversationHistory component's styling.
